use_cases: Display form validation error messages to users
Show success confirmations after form submission
Present warning notifications for incomplete actions
Render informational alerts with custom icons and actions
ai_summary: A versatile Alert notification component with multiple variants (default, warning, error, success, info) supporting both row and complex layouts. Features customizable icons and action buttons, with a notification mode that adds shadow styling. Designed for accessibility with role='alert' and uses Tailwind CSS for styling with CVA variants for easy theming.
